title: Pixel Auto LADA
body:
This is mod add very many lada cars

- IZH 27175 (heel)
- IZH 27175 (Pickup Truck)
- IZH 27175 with tuning
- VAZ 2101 (kopeck) including version 21013
- VAZ 2103 (troika) with 1300 and 1500 engine
- Vaz 21043-33 - pickup truck, it is unlikely that you have seen such
- Vaz 2104 - four, including the Riva version.
- VAZ 2105 - five, including the police and traffic police version
- Vaz 2106 - six
- Vaz 2107 - seven,
- Several tuning cars, IZH Korch and 2105 Nova, lowrider 21051
- Trailer SKIF M2
- Tuning: fog lights, roof rack, different engines and wheels, tow bar, taxi driver checkers.

very unstable mod..

NEEDS [IMMERSIVE VEHICLES](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minecraft-transport-simulator)!!!!!!!!!!!!
